chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ مَنْ عَرَفَ إِمَامَهُ لَمْ يَضُرَّهُ تَقَدَّمَ هَذَا الْأَمْرُ أَوْ تَأَخَّرَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 84 – The one who recognises his Imam<sup>asws</sup>, it would not harm him whether this matter (Rising of Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup>) is brought forward or delayed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (188/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (188/ 4)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ مَتَى الْفَرَجُ فَقَالَ يَا أَبَا بَصِيرٍ وَ أَنْتَ مِمَّنْ يُرِيدُ الدُّنْيَا مَنْ عَرَفَ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ فَقَدْ فُرِّجَ عَنْهُ لِانْتِظَارِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, raising it, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! When would the relief be?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Abu Baseer! And are you from the ones who want the world? The one who recognises this matter, so he has (already) been relieved, due to his awaiting it’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from in a Murfu‘ manner from Ali ibn Hamza from abu Basir who has said the following. “I said to abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.), “May Allah take my soul in service for your cause, when will relief will come?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “O abu Basir, are you after the worldly gains? In fact, one who has established faith in this matter (the rise of al-Mahdi with Divine Authority) he has already experienced relief of expecting his (coming with Divine Authority).”
